nasb.text: and you shall love the Lord your God with all your heart, and with all your soul, and with all your mind, and with all your strength.’

esv.text: And you shall love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind and with all your strength.’

cnv.text: 你要全心、全性、全意、全力，愛主你的　神。’

ccb.text: 你要全心、全情、全意、全力爱主——你的上帝’；

csbs.text: 你要以全心、全灵、全意、全力爱主——你的神。’
